# Chest Pain Template
Copy and paste this template to quickly generate a cardiac admission note.

```text
pt []M wt[]
alg nil
cc chest pain
hpi 
pmh htn 
sx chest_pain++ sob- diaphoresis- nausea-
vitals bp[] hr[] spo2[] rr[] temp[]
pe cvs:s1s2_normal rs:clear abd:soft
ix hb[] wbc[] na[] k[] cr[]
ix ecg:[]
ix trop-
dx Rule out ACS / Non-Cardiac Chest Pain
```
